title: Kūt-e ‘Abdollāh heat wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Kūt-e ‘Abdollāh with a Z-Score of +5.03. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Kūt-e ‘Abdollāh is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 16.6 GG. 
 The humidity level is relatively low at 15%, while the wind speed is moderate at 19.0 km/h. 
 The HDD is 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, which is typical for a heat wave event.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
